channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Deve Gowda expresses concern over informal protest practices in Parliament to Sonia Gandhi
item.description: Former Prime Minister H. D. Deve Gowda has written a letter to Congress president Sonia Gandhi expressing his concern regarding the prevailing culture of casual protests in the Indian Parliament. Acco...

item.title: High Court Approves Presidential Commission to Probe Post-Election Violence
item.description: Dar es Salaam — The High Court of Tanzania has dismissed a case challenging the President's decision to set up a commission of inquiry on violence linked to the October 29, 2025 General Election. Thre...

item.title: Comprehensive Guide to Paid Internship Opportunities in Kenya
item.description: Paid internships in Kenya are becoming a major stepping stone for students and fresh graduates looking to gain practical experience and kickstart their careers. Across sectors like finance, ICT, media...

item.title: Highlights from the 98th Academy Awards: Fashion and Winners
item.description: The 98th Academy Awards took place at the Dolby Theatre in Hollywood, Los Angeles, with major wins for 'Sinners' and 'One Battle After Another'. Michael B Jordan won Best Actor and Ryan Coogler receiv...

item.title: Five Women Die as Shop Roof Collapses During BISP Payments in Rahim Yar Khan
item.description: In Rahim Yar Khan, Punjab, a tragic accident occurred during the distribution of Benazir Income Support Programme (BISP) funds, where at least five women lost their lives and several others sustained ...

item.title: The Sequence and Science of Spring Blooming Flowers and Trees
item.description: This article explores the predictable sequence in which flowers and trees emerge during spring, highlighting the science behind their timing. The bloom calendar begins with cold-tolerant species like ...

item.title: South Africa Launches TB Dashboard to Strengthen Testing and Community Engagement
item.description: South Africa has launched a national TB dashboard, marking a significant step forward in transparency and accountability in the country's fight against tuberculosis. The dashboard, publicly accessible...

item.title: Tonto Dikeh Explains Why She Appreciates Ex-Husband Churchill On Mother’s Day
item.description: Nollywood actress Tonto Dikeh don clear eye say she no dey worry about critics wey dey talk say she dey overpraise her ex-husband, Olakunle Churchill. On Mother’s Day, she post for her Instagram story...

item.title: Concerns Raised Over Conduct at Parliamentary Ad Hoc Hearings
item.description: In South Africa, public proceedings have been underway, including the parliamentary ad hoc committee investigating allegations by Lt-Gen Nhlanhla Mankwanazi and the Madlanga Commission. Both aim to ta...

item.title: Bruno Mars Clarifies Support for Taylor Swift After Accidental Like on Critical Social Media Post
item.description: On March 16, 2026, singer Bruno Mars addressed a brief wave of online speculation after fans noticed his account had liked a social media post on X (formerly Twitter) that mocked Taylor Swift and ques...

item.title: VP Sara Duterte affirms OVP’s preparedness to support Filipinos affected by Middle East tensions
item.description: Vice President Sara Duterte expressed the Office of the Vice President’s (OVP) readiness to extend assistance to Filipinos who may be affected by the escalating conflict in the Middle East. Speaking d...

item.title: Search Continues for Missing Brazilian Academic in Essex After Laptop Discovery
item.description: Police are continuing their search for Vitoria Figueiredo Barreto, a 30-year-old Brazilian academic who went missing from Essex on March 3rd. Ms. Barreto was last seen after meeting a friend at Essex ...

item.title: Tinubu Orders Nationwide Rice Distribution to Support Muslims and Christians During Fasting Seasons
item.description: President Bola Ahmed Tinubu don give order make Renewed Hope Ambassadors distribute rice for the entire country to support Nigerians wey dey observe Ramadan and Lent. This move na part of effort to sh...

item.title: Nigerian troops stop coordinated terror attacks in Borno State
item.description: For Monday night around 12:30 am, wahala don almost happen for Maiduguri as insurgents try to carry out another attack for Ajilari, one suburb wey dey near the Nigerian Air Force base and close to the...

item.title: Full List of Oscars 2026 Winners and Honours
item.description: The 2026 Oscars ceremony has officially handed out the most prestigious awards in Hollywood. 'One Battle After Another' dominated with six wins, including Best Picture, Best Supporting Actor, and Best...

item.title: Nairobi Faces Severe Flooding as Heavy Rains Hit Multiple Areas
item.description: Nairobi has once again been hit by heavy rains that began on Saturday evening, causing widespread flooding in several parts of the city. Key areas affected include Parklands, the CBD, Ngong Road near ...

item.title: X Implements Policy to Limit AI-Generated War Misinformation Amid Middle East Conflict
item.description: AI-generated videos depicting dramatic scenes of the Middle East war—such as American soldiers captured by Iran, Israeli cities in ruins, and U.S. embassies on fire—are spreading widely on X, formerly...

item.title: National Unity Party Threatens to Exit House Majority Bloc Due to Unreleased Infrastructure and Social Funds
item.description: The National Unity Party (NUP), headed by Chairman and Deputy Speaker Ronaldo Puno of Antipolo City, is expressing strong dissatisfaction with House Speaker Faustino 'Bojie' Dy III's leadership. Puno ...

item.title: Decline in Giving Pledge Participation Highlights Shifts in Tech Philanthropy
item.description: In 2010, Warren Buffett and Bill Gates launched the Giving Pledge, encouraging the world's wealthiest individuals to commit to donating over half their fortunes during their lifetimes or after death. ...

item.title: Political Themes Have Long Influenced the Oscars
item.description: The Oscars have long been intertwined with politics, with Hollywood’s biggest night often reflecting broader social and political currents. From the McCarthyism era to the present day, political issue...
